scripts.build: bun run --filter @album/common build && bun run --filter @album/backend build && bun run --filter @album/frontend build
scripts.build:backend: bun run --filter @album/common build && bun run --filter @album/backend build
scripts.build:frontend: bun run --filter @album/common build && bun run --filter @album/frontend build
scripts.test: bun run --filter @album/common test && bun run --filter @album/backend test && bun run --filter @album/frontend test
scripts.lint: bun run --filter @album/common lint && bun run --filter @album/backend lint && bun run --filter @album/frontend lint
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "bun run --filter @album/backend dev" "bun run --filter @album/frontend dev"
